event_title: Strait of Hormuz shipping disruption risk
thesis: Strait of Hormuz shipping disruption risk creates medium-high conviction long opportunity in Frontline (FRO) via tanker_shipping exposure.
invalidation_condition: Event de-escalates OR Frontline decouples from Maritime disruption risk.
